subject: Create cc-teams messaging-protocol.md reference
description:
Create `claude/claude-tools/skills/cc-teams/references/messaging-protocol.md` documenting all 5 SendMessage protocol types with complete field tables and usage guidance.

Content must cover all 5 message types:

1. **message** (Direct Message):
   - Fields: type ("message"), recipient (agent name, required), content (message text, required), summary (5-10 word preview, required)
   - Usage: Default for all teammate communication; always prefer over broadcast
   - Example with tool call syntax

2. **broadcast** (Team-Wide Message):
   - Fields: type ("broadcast"), content (required), summary (required)
   - Cost warning: N messages for N team members — expensive, use sparingly
   - Valid use cases: critical blocking issues, major team-wide announcements
   - Invalid use cases: responding to one person, normal conversation, task follow-ups
   - Example with tool call syntax

3. **shutdown_request** (Request Teammate Shutdown):
   - Fields: type ("shutdown_request"), recipient (required), content (optional reason)
   - Usage: Team lead sends when work is complete
   - Recipient receives shutdown request with requestId
   - Example with tool call syntax

4. **shutdown_response** (Respond to Shutdown):
   - Fields: type ("shutdown_response"), request_id (from shutdown request, required), approve (boolean, required), content (rejection reason if approve=false)
   - Approve flow: sends confirmation, terminates process
   - Reject flow: sends reason to leader, continues working
   - Critical: must extract request_id from JSON message; text acknowledgment alone is NOT sufficient
   - Example with tool call syntax for both approve and reject

5. **plan_approval_response** (Approve/Reject Plan):
   - Fields: type ("plan_approval_response"), request_id (required), recipient (required), approve (boolean, required), content (feedback if rejected)
   - Triggered when teammate with plan_mode_required calls ExitPlanMode
   - Approve: teammate exits plan mode, can implement
   - Reject: teammate receives feedback, revises plan
   - Example with tool call syntax

Additional sections:
- **Peer DM Visibility**: Team leads see brief summaries of teammate-to-teammate DMs in idle notifications
- **Automatic Message Delivery**: Messages delivered automatically (not polling-based); teammates don't need to check inboxes
- **Message Best Practices**: Always refer to teammates by name (not UUID), include summary for UI preview, keep content focused

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] All 5 message types documented with field tables
- [ ] message type: recipient, content, summary fields and usage
- [ ] broadcast type: content, summary fields with cost warning (N messages for N members)
- [ ] shutdown_request/shutdown_response types: full lifecycle including request_id handling
- [ ] plan_approval_response type: approve/reject with feedback
- [ ] Peer DM visibility for team leads documented
- [ ] Automatic message delivery mechanism explained (not polling-based)
- [ ] Each type includes concrete tool call examples

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] File is self-contained and independently loadable
- [ ] Clear distinction between when to use message vs broadcast

**Testing Requirements:**
• Verification: All 5 message types documented with all required fields
• Verification: Examples use correct SendMessage tool call syntax

Source: internal/specs/claude-tools-plugin-SPEC.md Section 5.2 (US-005)
